title: Appearance Pointers -- Multimodal Region Control of Diffusion Transformers
innovation_summary: Appearance Pointers -- Multimodal Region Control of Diffusion Transformers: We introduce appearance pointers, compact tokens that guide DiTs toward the correct appearance cues at the correct spatial locations by aligning text or image inputs with.
